name: NavCardButton
description: Outlined pill CTA specific to the GNAV Nav Card. Token bindings come directly from the Nav Button component set (default / hover / active) so this stays in sync with the redesign spec.

props.name: href
props.description: When provided, renders as <a>. Otherwise renders as <button>.

tokenFlags.suggestedToken: Document with Primitive comment until blur tokens exist
tokenFlags.note: Matches Nav Card spec. Implementation must include `/* Primitive: nav button glass blur */`.

layerNames..root: Outlined pill button (100% width of the nav card)
layerNames..label: Center-aligned CTA text

dimensions.width: Fills parent (NavCardShell clamps to 340px with a 240px min)
dimensions.height: 40px (derived from sm padding, border width, and 2xs line-height)
dimensions.note:
Padding-block removes the stroke thickness before applying 
var(--s2a-spacing-sm) so the total block-size matches the 40px spec. The explicit min-height mirrors the same math to avoid 42px rendering in Storybook.

keyboard: Tab focuses the CTA after the text links
Enter triggers navigation when rendered as <a>
notes: Ensure focus ring remains visible against both on-light and on-dark containers.
If multiple Nav Cards contain identical CTA labels, provide aria-label/context so screen readers can distinguish them.
